name: keepseek
description: AI-powered coding agent for VS Code

commands.title: KeepSeek: Add Current File to Context
KeepSeek: Add Workspace Files to Context
KeepSeek: Add External Files to Context
KeepSeek: Add Terminal Selection to Chat
KeepSeek: Add Debug Console Selection to Chat

keepseek.apiKey.markdownDescription:
Your DeepSeek API key. If set, this takes precedence over the `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` environment variable.

If both are empty, KeepSeek will prompt you to enter the key on first use.

keepseek.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the DeepSeek V4 API. Defaults to `https://api.deepseek.com`.

keepseek.selectedModelId.markdownDescription: Selected model for the current workspace. An empty or unavailable value falls back to the first supported model.

keepseek.thinkingEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable Thinking mode for the current workspace.

keepseek.reasoningEffort.markdownDescription: Thinking effort for the current workspace.

keepseek.systemPrompt.markdownDescription: Custom system prompt to prepend to all conversations.

keepseek.useGit.markdownDescription: Enable Git integration for context-aware suggestions.

keepseek.useActiveEditor.markdownDescription: Include active editor content as context automatically.

keepseek.projectInstructions.contextBudg.markdownDescription: Maximum estimated tokens used by root AGENTS.md project instructions in each Agent run.

keepseek.skills.contextBudgetChars.markdownDescription: Maximum total characters used by activated Codex-compatible Skill instructions in each Agent run. Skill scripts are never executed.

keepseek.skills.maxImplicitActivations.markdownDescription: Maximum number of allowImplicit Skills that deterministic request matching may activate per Agent run.

keepseek.background.maxRounds.markdownDescription: Maximum number of Agent rounds for a VS Code background repair task.

keepseek.background.maxDurationMs.markdownDescription: Maximum total duration of a background repair task in milliseconds.

keepseek.background.maxToolCalls.markdownDescription: Maximum cumulative tool calls across all rounds of a background repair task.

keepseek.maxHistoryMessages.markdownDescription: Maximum number of chat history messages to retain per session.

keepseek.language.markdownDescription: Language preference. `auto` follows VS Code display language.

enumDescriptions: Never let the agent run validation tasks.
Ask once per validation scope (compile/lint or test) for each Agent run.
Allow the fixed compile, lint, and test scripts without prompting.
keepseek.validation.authorizationPolicy.markdownDescription: Medium-risk authorization policy for KeepSeek's controlled validation tools. In `ask` mode, compile/lint and test are authorized separately for each Agent run. Only fixed `npm run compile`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run test` tasks are eligible; arbitrary shell commands remain unavailable.

keepseek.validation.maxRunsPerAgentRun.markdownDescription: Maximum number of controlled validation tasks an Agent run may start. Set to 0 to disable validation execution.

keepseek.validation.maxRepairIterations.markdownDescription: Maximum number of validation-failure repair attempts in one Agent run. Repairs remain pending ChangeSets and validation pauses until the user applies them.

keepseek.validation.timeoutMs.markdownDescription: Maximum duration in milliseconds for each controlled validation task.
